item.title: 数据工程 101：数据工程简介 | Data Engineering 101: Introduction to Data Engineering
item.description:
约翰·曼波

发表于随着全球技术的飞速发展，数据处理已成为一项巨大挑战，尤其是当数据必须从存储转移到用户，从不同的原始格式转移到新格式而不失去其价值时。
为了处理这些数据，数据工程是必不可少的。

什么是数据工程？

数据工程是构建/架构数据平台、设计和实施数据存储和存储库、数据湖以及收集、导入、清理、预处理、查询、分析数据、性能监控、评估、优化和微调的艺术流程和系统。 它使数据可用于分析和有效的数据驱动决策。

数据工程师的角色是什么？

数据工程师的职责是存储、提取、转换、加载、聚合和验证数据。
这涉及：

  • 为需要查询数据的工具构建数据管道并有效地存储数据。

  • 分析数据，确保其遵守数据治理规则和法规。

  • 了解数据存储和查询选项的优缺点。

数据工程师提供：

  • 正确的数据。

  • 以正确的形式。

  • 给正确的人。

  • 尽可能高效。

数据工程师负责：

  • 从不同来源摄取数据。

  • 优化用于分析的数据库。

  • 删除损坏的数据。

  • 开发、构建、测试和维护数据架构。

为什么数据工程很重要？

数据工程生命周期包括构建数据平台、设计和实施数据存储、存储库和数据湖，以及收集、传递、清理、预处理、查询、分析数据、性能监控、评估、优化和调整系统。
各种规模的公司都有大量不同的数据需要梳理，以回答关键的业务问题。 数据工程旨在支持该过程，使数据消费者（例如分析师、数据科学家和高管）能够可靠、快速、安全地检查所有可用数据。

数据工程工具和技能

数据工程师使用许多工具来处理数据。 他们使用一套专门的技能来创建端到端的数据管道，将数据从源系统移动到目标目的地。
数据工程师使用各种工具和技术，例如：

  • 他们访问数据，然后应用规则通过步骤“转换”数据，使其更适合分析。

  • 云数据存储：包括Amazon S3、Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS)、谷歌云存储等。

  • 查询引擎：引擎对数据运行查询以返回答案。 数据工程师可能会使用 Dremio Sonar、Spark、Flink 等引擎。

  • 数据工程师可以选择将 Python 用于 ETL 任务。

  • 数据工程与数据科学

一旦暂停，mambosmambo 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，mambosmambo 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦未发布，mambosmambo 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 mambosmambo 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 mambosmambo 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 mambosmambo 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

john mambo

Posted on Aug 19

With the tremendous growth of technology throughout the World, Data handling has been a big challenge especially when the data has to be moved from storage to users, from different original formats to new formats without losing its value.
To handle this data, Data Engineering is essential.

What is Data Engineering?

Data Engineering is the art of building/architecting data platforms, designing and implementing data stores and repositories, data lakes and gathering, importing, cleaning, pre-processing, querying, analyzing data, performance monitoring, evaluation, optimization, and fine-tuning the processes and systems. It makes Data available for analysis and efficient Data-driven decision-making.

What is the Role of a Data Engineer?

It’s the role of a data engineer to store, extract, transform, load, aggregate, and validate data.
This involves:

  • Building data pipelines and efficiently storing data for tools that need to query the data.

  • Analyzing the data, ensuring it adheres to data governance rules and regulations.

  • Understanding the pros and cons of data storage and query options.

Data Engineers deliver:

  • The Correct data.

  • In the Correct Form.

  • To the Right People.

  • As Efficiently as Possible.

Data Engineers are Responsible for:

  • Ingesting Data from different Sources.

  • Optimizing Databases for Analysis.

  • Removing Corrupted Data.

  • Develop, Construct, test, and Maintain Data Architecture.

Why is Data Engineering important?

The Data Engineering lifecycle consists of building data platforms, designing and implementing Data Stores, Repos, and Data Lakes, and gathering, imparting, cleaning, preprocessing, querying, analyzing data, performance monitoring, evaluation, optimization, and tuning the System.
Companies of all sizes have huge amounts of disparate data to comb through to answer critical business questions. Data engineering is designed to support the process, making it possible for consumers of data, such as analysts, data scientists, and executives, to reliably, quickly, and securely inspect all of the data available.

Data Engineering Tools and skills

Data Engineers use many tools to work with Data. They use a specialized skill set to create end-to-end data pipelines that move Data from Source systems to target destinations.
Data Engineers work with a variety of tools and technologies, such as:

  • ETL Tools: ETL (extract, transform, load) tools move data between systems. They access data, then apply rules to “transform” the data through steps that make it more suitable for analysis.

  • Cloud Data Storage: Including Amazon S3, Azure Data Lake Storage (ADLS), Google Cloud Storage, etc.

  • Query Engines: Engines run queries against data to return answers. Data engineers may work with engines like Dremio Sonar, Spark, Flink, and others.

  • Python: Python is a general programming language. Data engineers may choose to use Python for ETL tasks.

  • SQL: Structured Query Language (SQL) is the standard language for querying relational databases.

Data Engineering Versus Data Science

Once suspended, mambosmambo will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, mambosmambo will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by mambosmambo will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If mambosmambo is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag mambosmambo:

mambosmambo consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging mambosmambo will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: mambosmambo

item.title: 打字稿更大或更小 | Typescript Greater Equal Or Lesser
item.description:
酸性编码器

发表于仅使用类型比较数字

export type CreateArrayWithLengthX < LENGTH extends number , ACC extends unknown [] = [] > = ACC [ ' length ' ] extends LENGTH ? ACC : CreateArrayWithLengthX < LENGTH , [... ACC , 1 ] > export type CompareAToB < A extends number [], B extends number [] > = A [ ' length ' ] extends B [ ' length ' ] ? ' equal ' : A extends [ infer C , ... infer D extends number []] ? B extends [ infer M , ... infer N extends number []] ? CompareAToB < D , N > : ' greater ' : B [ ' length ' ] extends 0 ? ' equal ' : ' lesser ' type E = CompareAToB < CreateArrayWithLengthX < 99 > , CreateArrayWithLengthX < 100 >> // lesser // ^? type F = CompareAToB < CreateArrayWithLengthX < 100 > , CreateArrayWithLengthX < 100 >> // equal // ^? type G = CompareAToB < CreateArrayWithLengthX < 101 > , CreateArrayWithLengthX < 100 >> // greater // ^?

最大有效数为 1000

维塔利·波马尼茨基—— 一旦暂停，tylim88 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，tylim88 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，tylim88 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 tylim88 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 tylim88 的方法：

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 tylim88 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Acid Coder

Posted on Aug 19

Compare number using type only

export type CreateArrayWithLengthX< LENGTH extends number, ACC extends unknown[] = []
> = ACC['length'] extends LENGTH ? ACC : CreateArrayWithLengthX<LENGTH, [...ACC, 1]> export type CompareAToB< A extends number[], B extends number[]
> = A['length'] extends B['length'] ? 'equal' : A extends [infer C, ...infer D extends number[]] ? B extends [infer M, ...infer N extends number[]] ? CompareAToB<D, N> : 'greater' : B['length'] extends 0 ? 'equal' : 'lesser' type E = CompareAToB<CreateArrayWithLengthX<99>,CreateArrayWithLengthX<100>> // lesser
// ^?
type F = CompareAToB<CreateArrayWithLengthX<100>,CreateArrayWithLengthX<100>> // equal 
// ^?
type G = CompareAToB<CreateArrayWithLengthX<101>,CreateArrayWithLengthX<100>> // greater
// ^?

playground

max valid number is 1000

Vitali Pomanitski - Aug 13

Once suspended, tylim88 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, tylim88 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by tylim88 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If tylim88 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag tylim88:

tylim88 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging tylim88 will restore default visibility to their posts.
